dashboard.heroBody: Shape the landing surface around the work you do most, jump back into recent flows, and keep training, HANA, and model activity in view from the first screen.
dashboard.heroPairsDetail: Live HANA-backed training context ready for pipeline generation.
dashboard.heroComputeDetail: Monitor VRAM pressure before you launch the next tuning run.
dashboard.widgetControlBody: Show the widgets you need, hide the ones you do not, and move them into the order that matches your workflow.
dashboard.noQuickAccess: Save a page or open a few routes to build your quick return stack.
dashboard.product.workbenchDesc: Training, data preparation, HANA exploration, and model operations live here.
dashboard.product.experienceDesc: Joule, UI composition, collaboration, and document workflows live in SAP AI Experience.
dashboard.hub.homeDesc: Start from the overall system pulse, then branch into the hub you need next.
dashboard.hub.dataDesc: Prepare assets, shape schemas, and validate the structure that feeds training and retrieval.
dashboard.hub.assistDesc: Ask questions, work with knowledge sources, and review document intelligence in context.
dashboard.hub.operationsDesc: Launch runs, tune models, inspect HANA, and ship artifacts with production guardrails.
